mapper.select: SELECT ID, BO_HAI_TONG_ID, BO_HAI_TONG_SHIP_ID, SCN, SHIP_ID, SHIP_NAME, IMP_EXP, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, IS_WATER, IS_SHORE_POWER, REQ_WATER, REQ_ELECTRICITY, BOW_DRAFT, STERN_DRAFT, IS_TUG, TUG_NUMBER, PILOTAGE, IS_PAYMENT, PAYMENT_AMOUNT, IS_DANGEROUS, ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN, LEAVE_PORT_TIME_PLAN, ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME, LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME, BERTH_TIME, BERTH_ID, BERTH_NAME, BERTH_TYPE, BOLLARD_NO_START, BOLLARD_NO_END, LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, RECEIVE_BY, RECEIVE_BY_NAME, RECEIVE_TIME, DEL_FLAG, DEL_REMARK, DEL_BY, DEL_BY_NAME, DEL_TIME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, START_PORT_ID, START_PORT_NAME, END_PORT_ID, END_PORT_NAME, PRE_PORT_ID, PRE_PORT_NAME, NEXT_PORT_ID, NEXT_PORT_NAME, SHIP_STATUS_CODE, SHIP_STATUS_NAME, IS_LAST_ARRIVAL_TYPE, IS_START_WORK FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TBCI.ID CARGO_INFO_ID, TDSI.ID, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, T3.TRUST_NO, MAX( TPPSD.COMPANY_NAME ) COMPANY_NAME, TO_CHAR( MAX( TPPSD.INOUT_DATE ), 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) INOUT_DATE, TBCI.TRADE_TYPE TRADE_TYPE, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_AGENT_NAME CARGO_AGENT_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_NAME CARGO_NAME, TBCI.PACKING_NAME PACKING_NAME, SUM( TPPSD.QUANTITY ) QUANTITY, SUM( TPPSD.TON ) TON FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDSI LEFT JOIN T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST TBH ON TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ID =TDSI.ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBCI.ID =TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT LISTAGG ( TRUST_NO, ',' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY TRUST_NO ) TRUST_NO, CARGO_INFO_ID FROM ( SELECT TRUST_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID GROUP BY TRUST_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID ) GROUP BY CARGO_INFO_ID ) T3 ON TBCI.ID = T3.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL TPPSD ON TPPSD.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID
TPPSD.CARGO_INFO_ID IS NOT NULL
AND TDSI.ID = #{shipVoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
GROUP BY TBCI.ID, TDSI.ID, TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, T3.TRUST_NO, TBCI.TRADE_TYPE, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_AGENT_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, TBCI.PACKING_NAME

SELECT TFID.STATEMENT_NO, TFI.COMPANY_NAME, TFI.CUSTOMER_NAME, TFID.TYPE, TFID.SCN, CONCAT(CONCAT(t4.SHIP_NAME, '_'),t5.VOYAGE) as "shipNameVoyage", TFID.RATE_ITEM_NAME, TFID.NUMBER_COUNT, TFID.NUMBER_COUNT2, TFID.PIECE_AMOUNT, TFID.AMOUNT, TFID.TAX, TFID.TAX_AMOUNT, TFI.SYS_INVOICE_CODE, TFI.INVOICE_TIME, TFI.STATUS, TFID.SHIPVOYAGE_ID FROM T_FD_INVOICE_DETAIL TFID LEFT JOIN T_FD_INVOICE TFI ON TFI.ID = TFID.INVOICE_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE t4 ON TFID.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = t4.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM t5 ON TFID.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = t5.ID WHERE TFID.SHIPVOYAGE_ID =#{shipVoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDSI LEFT JOIN T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST TBH ON TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ID =TDSI.ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBCI.ID =TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID where TDSI.ID=#{shipVoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
